basic_details.job_title: BECIL Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Broadcast Engineering Consultants India Limited (BECIL) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 5 Office Assistant Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any discipline with 50% or more marks, 2 years’ experience as Office Assistant in a reputed organization, Proficiency in MS Office and other computer applications
qualification.details: Graduate in any discipline with 50% or more marks. 2 years’ experience as Office Assistant in a reputed organization. Proficiency in MS Office and other computer applications.

salary_details.salary_range: Minimum wages as per Delhi Government rules
salary_details.details: Minimum wages as per Delhi Government rules.

selection_process: and relevant experience. Interview/assessment/skill test (if any). Final selection by client (NBA).
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BECIL Office Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BECIL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BECIL Office Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the BECIL Office Assistant posts is 13th May 2026. Ensure you apply well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Office Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates in any discipline with a minimum of 50% marks. Additionally, 2 years of experience as an Office Assistant and proficiency in MS Office are required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Office Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Office Assistant post is 30 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Office Assistant role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Office Assistant position will be based on the minimum wages as per Delhi Government rules.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the BECIL Office Assistant jobs?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official BECIL website or the direct application link provided in the Important Links section before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for BECIL Office Assistant Recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of ₹295/- for General/OBC candidates. SC/ST candidates are exempted from the application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for BECIL Office Assistant Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting based on eligibility, marks, and experience, followed by an interview/assessment/skill test, and final selection by the client.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Office Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the Office Assistant position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity offered by Broadcast Engineering Consultants India Limited (BECIL).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.
